case_title: MORGAN BEALL et al VS. LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $800.00 FILED BY BEALL, MORGAN BEALL, TIM AS TO DEFENDANT LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-30-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED SEP-22-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-30-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-30-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEALL, MORGAN BEALL, TIM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS $682.19 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $712.19, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFFS RESPONSIBLE FOR RENT THROUGH JUNE 1, 2009, AND ARE ENTITLED TO A RETURN OF THEIR SECURITY DEPOSIT IN THE AMOUNT OF $682.19 WITH NOTHING FURTHER OWED TO DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
